text: Does what Madam Bellinsky said come true?
zh: 马达姆·贝林斯基说的话会成真吗?

text: At a village fair, I decided to visit a fortune-teller called Madam Bellinsky.
zh: 在一个乡村集市上,我决定去找一位叫马达姆·贝林斯基的算命师。

text: I went into her tent and she told me to sit down.
zh: 我走进她的帐篷,她让我坐下。

text: After I had given her some money, she looked into a crystal ball and said:
zh: 我付了一些钱后,她盯着水晶球看,说道:

text: 'A relation of yours is coming to see you.
She will be arriving this evening and intends to stay for a few days.
zh: 她今晚就会到,打算住上几天。

text: The moment you leave this tent, you will get a big surprise.
zh: 你一走出这个帐篷,就会大吃一惊。

text: A woman you know well will rush towards you.
zh: 一位你熟识的女子会朝你冲过来。

text: She will speak to you and then she will lead you away from this place. That is all.'
zh: 她会跟你说话,然后带你离开这个地方。就这些了。'

text: As soon as I went outside, I forgot all about Madam Bellinsky because my wife hurried towards me.
zh: 我一走出去,就把马达姆·贝林斯基的话忘得一干二净,因为我妻子急匆匆地朝我走来。

text: 'Where have you been hiding?' she asked impatiently.
zh: '你躲到哪儿去了?'她不耐烦地问道。

text: 'Your sister will be here in less than an hour and we must be at the station to meet her. We are late already.'
zh: '你妹妹不到一个小时就要到了,我们得去车站接她。我们已经迟了。'

text: As she walked away, I followed her out of the fair.
zh: 她转身离去时,我跟着她走出了集市。
